channel.title: Eudaimonia Feed
channel.description: RSS entries filtered for lasting importance, personal growth, and eudaimonia. Updated 4x daily.

item.title: Examining the Supreme Court's birthright citizenship, campaign finance rulings
item.description:
The Supreme Court wrapped up its term issuing major rulings in cases centered on some of the nation's biggest political fights. The most high-profile is a landmark ruling striking down President Trump's executive order seeking to end birthright citizenship. Geoff Bennett discussed more with Supreme Court analyst and SCOTUSblog co-founder Amy Howe.
[Eudaimonia Filter — Lasting: 10/10 | Growth: 9/10 | Eudaimonia: 9/10 — Landmark Supreme Court rulings on birthright citizenship and campaign finance have profound and lasting constitutional impact.]
